perFrameCode: volb = bnot(q24)*volb + q24*vol_; //# vol oder vol_ ?
//*********** SMOOTH MOVEMENTS q1 - q8 for SHAPE2 ********
tmp = mov1; mov1 = mov1+speed; q2 = mov1-tmp; q1 = mov1;
//evtl q5 mit rotmode fixieren statt volx blockieren
tmp = RotMode; q3 = RotMode; q4 = RotMode-tmp;
tmp = volx; q5 = volx; q6 = q5-tmp; //nicht aendern waehrend Rotation
q15 = spur*(1-RotMode); //Ampl. multiple spurs; nur mit >8 copies !
q30 = max(sin(mov1/2.2)*sin(time/7),0)+q26;// front cloud dens. - comp.
q31 = q5*2-2 + sin(time/17); //back cloud lighting - comp shader
